idea-plugin.name: Database MCP Tools
idea-plugin.description:
Extends DataGrip's built-in MCP server with 6 database tools. AI assistants like Claude Code can query databases through DataGrip's existing connections — SSH tunnels, SSL, and auth included — with zero extra config.

Tools

  • list_datasources — List all configured datasources with connection status
  • get_schema — Get tables, columns, types, and primary keys
  • run_query — Execute SQL queries with row limits and timeouts
  • explain_query — Get execution plans (auto-detects EXPLAIN syntax per driver)
  • get_table_info — Columns, indexes, and foreign keys for a table
  • search_schema — Search tables and columns by pattern

Safety

Read-only by default. Writes must be explicitly enabled per datasource in Settings > Tools > Database MCP Tools.
